manager.name: On-chain Fundamentals
manager.description: Leans on real on-chain context from DefiLlama and Mobula in the live signal layer, while historical ranking and backtests are limited to the stored price, event, and news history available in the system. manager.memoStyle: Protocol fundamentals brief with on-chain context where available
manager.universe: DeFi protocols with measurable TVL, fee revenue, and on-chain activity (ETH, SOL, TRON, Base ecosystems)
